title: FormatTemporalPlainYearMonth<{min,max}>
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatTemporalPlainYearMonth<{min,max}> (a Temporal.PlainYearMonth branded with a year-month range); the bounds constrain validation only, so the PlainYearMonth serializes exactly like an unbranded one — toJSON() "YYYY-MM" string in JSON, restored via Temporal.PlainYearMonth.from().
notes: Branded Temporal.PlainYearMonth: serialization uses the base Temporal kind (brand is validation-only); JSON carries the year-month string and restores via .from().
